lessons.title: Prop Drilling Problem
lessons.description: Understand the challenge of passing props through many layers.

lessons.title: Creating Context and Provider
lessons.description: Learn to create a Context object and provide values to children.

lessons.title: useContext Hook
lessons.description: Consume context values in function components with useContext.

lessons.title: Combining Reducers with Context
lessons.description: Manage complex state with useReducer and provide it via Context.

lessons.title: Best Practices and When to Use Context
lessons.description: Learn when Context is appropriate and how to organise it.
